svg.title: ProcureAgent multi-agent architecture diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture of the ProcureAgent system showing user interface, orchestrator agent, four specialist agents, Azure services layer, data sources, security, monitoring, and CI/CD layers

g.text: Azure AI Foundry · Semantic Kernel AgentGroupChat · GPT-4o

GitHub Actions · Azure DevOps · MLflow (model registry) · Azure Container Apps (deployment)
